allow: PowerShell($snd='C:\\claude_code_projects\\tank.mp3'; try{ Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; $p=New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; $p.Open\([uri]$snd\); $n=0; while\(-not $p.NaturalDuration.HasTimeSpan -and $n -lt 20\){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100;$n++}; $d=if\($p.NaturalDuration.HasTimeSpan\){$p.NaturalDuration.TimeSpan.TotalSeconds}else{5}; $p.Play\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds \([math]::Min\([math]::Ceiling\($d\)+1,8\)\); $p.Stop\(\); $p.Close\(\); "played $snd, dur=$d sec" }catch{ "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command',"Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; `$p=New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; `$p.Open\([uri]'C:\\claude_code_projects\\tank.mp3'\); `$p.Play\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; `$p.Stop\(\); `$p.Close\(\)"; "запущен фоновый проигрыватель tank.mp3")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden powershell -ArgumentList '\\''-NoProfile'\\'','\\''-Command'\\'','\\''Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; $p=New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; $p.Open\([uri]'\\'''\\''C:\\claude_code_projects\\tank.mp3'\\'''\\''\); $p.Play\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $p.Stop\(\); $p.Close\(\)'\\''')

PowerShell($snd='C:\\claude_code_projects\\tank.mp3'; if\(-not \(Test-Path $snd\)\){ "MISSING: $snd"; return }; try{ Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; $p=New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; $p.Open\([uri]$snd\); $n=0; while\(-not $p.NaturalDuration.HasTimeSpan -and $n -lt 30\){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100;$n++}; $d=if\($p.NaturalDuration.HasTimeSpan\){$p.NaturalDuration.TimeSpan.TotalSeconds}else{-1}; $p.Play\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $p.Stop\(\); $p.Close\(\); "PLAYED ok, duration=$d sec, waited_ticks=$n" }catch{ "ERROR: $_" })
